treatments.label: Treatments
treatments.heading: Beauty treatments in Zurich
treatments.sub: Individual sessions bookable separately in Zurich.

ayurveda.desc: An ancient sensory journey to rebalance body and mind through traditional Ayurvedic techniques.

candle.desc: Warm aromatic candle wax melted onto the body for deep nourishing, relaxing, and sensory benefits.

deepRelease.desc: Targeted techniques on muscle knots to release deep tension and restore lightness to the body.

backNeck.desc: A focused session on the back and neck — ideal for those who spend long hours at a screen.

drain.desc: Specific draining manoeuvres to stimulate lymphatic circulation and reduce puffiness and water retention.

sculpt.desc: Intensive anti-cellulite treatment to improve skin texture and redefine body contours.

deepInfinity.desc: A sensorial massage to restore body and mind.

premamum.desc: A gentle, safe massage for expectant mothers, designed to ease pregnancy discomforts.

reflex.desc: Foot reflexology stimulates reflex points to naturally rebalance organs and body systems.

dryBrush.desc: Dry exfoliation with a natural brush to stimulate microcirculation, smooth the skin, and support drainage.

wrap.desc: Draining and sculpting wrap with detox active ingredients to smooth, firm, and reshape your silhouette.

pureBody.desc: A detoxifying treatment that restores vitality to the body through an initial exfoliation phase, followed by the application of anti-inflammatory and purifying thermal mud.

cleanse.desc: Deep facial cleanse to clear pores, even skin tone, and restore luminosity.

silk.desc: An intensive facial with silky textures that nourish, soften, and illuminate skin in depth.

collagen.desc: Anti-ageing ritual with collagen-stimulating for firmer, smoother, more youthful skin.

phytoHarmony.desc: A holistic facial treatment combining three massage techniques for the face, visceral area, and soles of the feet. This synergy stimulates the main organs involved in the body’s natural detoxification processes, promoting a sense of lightness, balance, and deep well-being.

curativePedicure.desc: A focused foot care treatment for comfort, grooming, and a clean, healthy finish.

postpartum.label: Post-partum Journey
postpartum.heading: Find yourself again.
postpartum.heroIT: Lo sto vivendo adesso con il mio neonato tra le braccia, in una città che non è casa mia, lontana dalla mia famiglia. Ho cercato qualcuno che mi aiutasse davvero... Non a sembrare come prima ma a ritrovarmi. A sentirmi bene nella mia pelle — quella nuova, quella che racconta chi sono diventata. Non l'ho trovato. Allora ho deciso di crearlo io. 🌿
postpartum.heroEN: I know that moment. I'm living it right now with my newborn in my arms, in a city that isn't home, far from my family. I looked for someone to truly help me — not to look like before, but to find myself again. To feel good in my own skin — this new skin, the one that tells the story of who I've become. I couldn't find it. So I decided to create it myself. 🌿
forWhoItems: Expat mamas without family support nearby
Women who want to find themselves again after birth — not just 'go back to before'
Anyone looking for holistic support in Italian or English

about.label: About
about.heading: Marta Fantozzi
about.bioIntro:
Welcome to my world of conscious beauty and exclusive journeys.
My name is Marta Fantozzi, an Italian aesthetician and specialist in aesthetic medicine with over 10 years of experience. I have worked in institutes and longevity clinics, combining aesthetics, targeted treatments, and psycho-physical well-being into personalised programs. In Zurich and online, I offer tailor-made journeys for your skin, energy, and vitality, adapted to your lifestyle.
about.bioDetail: Between 2021 and 2024 Marta served as Therapist and Beauty Ambassador at The Longevity Suite, an advanced longevity centre in Monza, specialising in cryotherapy, UltraShape, Multi LED Sensory, LPG, radiofrequency, Ultratone, laser, and cosmeceutics — as well as advanced massage techniques including Kobido and manual lifting. She refined her expertise in nutrition through intermittent fasting, detox protocols, and supplementation. Earlier in her career she directed beauty centres in Rome and Parma, trained new staff, and appeared as a make-up artist on Italian television. She also holds a first-level Reiki certification.
